layout_strategies.global: min-h-screen bg-background text-foreground overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-cyan-500/30 selection:text-cyan-100

hero.description: A focused, central upload zone. Not a full screen hero. It should feel like a specialized tool interface.
hero.classes: flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 relative z-10

dashboard.grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-8 max-w-[1600px] mx-auto

areas.summary: col-span-12 md:col-span-12 lg:col-span-12 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4

chat.container: fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] md:w-[600px] lg:w-[800px] z-50

bubbles.user: bg-slate-800/80 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-6 py-4 ml-auto max-w-[80%] backdrop-blur-md border border-slate-700
bubbles.ai: bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan-900/40 to-blue-900/40 text-cyan-50 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-6 py-4 mr-auto max-w-[80%] backdrop-blur-md border border-cyan-500/20 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(56,189,248,0.1)]

Button.default: rounded-full font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95

Card.base: rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden

Input.base: bg-slate-900/50 border-slate-700 focus:border-cyan-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-400/50 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run `yarn add framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge` if not present.
2. SETUP: Add the Google Fonts link to `public/index.html`.
3. CONFIG: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the colors and fonts defined above. ENSURE `darkMode: 'class'` is set.
4. THEME: In `src/index.css`, replace the `:root` variables with the dark mode palette provided. DELETE the light mode variables or make them same as dark (Force Dark Mode).

5. BACKGROUND: Add a global `div` with the background image URL, fixed position, z-index -1, opacity 20% (0.2), and `bg-cover bg-center`. Overlay a radial gradient `bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_center,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-transparent via-background/80 to-background` to fade edges.
6. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: Go through `src/components/ui` and update `card.jsx`, `button.jsx`, `input.jsx` to match the `components` style rules above. Remove default shadcn white backgrounds.
7. LAYOUT IMPLEMENTATION: Rebuild `App.js`. Use a `Layout` component that handles the background and centered container.
8. CHAT: Implement the 'Floating Command Center' chat. It should be overlaid at the bottom. Use `AnimatePresence` from framer-motion for bubble entrance animations.
9. CHARTS: Style Recharts to use the neon palette. remove grid lines or make them very subtle (`#333`). Tooltips should be dark glass.
10. TABLES: Use a transparent table style. `tr` hover should be `bg-white/5`.
11. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add `whileHover={{ scale: 1.02 }}` to cards using framer-motion.
universal_guidelines: DO NOT use generic centered text layouts.
DO NOT use gradients for text unless it's a very large heading.
Use 'Outfit' font for all Headings (h1-h3). Use 'Inter' for body.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
